description: Style NoteTaking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels and vibrant shades. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist.Product DetailsBright yellow top, has adjustable spaghetti straps, slightly curved neckline which is elasticated at the back, dark grey panel in the front at the neckline, gathers below the panel and has a lining insideMaterial and Care100% polyester Machine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cold ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
